title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nerolac Select - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nerolac Select - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
